commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f79b9619cf19fcab93525c4372b01d8495f2f957)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes AGENTS.md post-compaction reinjection require an explicit `agents.defaults.compaction.postCompactionSections` array, threads that policy through the safeguard summary path, updates docs/config help/tests/changelog, and improves collapsed Control UI tool-row wrapping and summary text.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main reinjects default AGENTS.md sections when the config key is absent and keeps collapsed tool rows small, muted, nowrap, and ellipsized; I did not run a live browser capture in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is a maintainer compatibility/session-state decision for a protected maintainer PR, not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: fix: make compaction reinjection opt-in
target.body:
## Summary

- make post-compaction AGENTS.md section reinjection opt-in via `agents.defaults.compaction.postCompactionSections`
- carry that opt-in through post-compaction context and compaction-safeguard summary suffix paths, including the effective run workspace for AGENTS.md reads
- keep explicit default section lists working, including legacy `Every Session` / `Safety` fallback only for opted-in configs
- improve collapsed Control UI tool rows so summary text wraps/readably colors in light/dark themes, connector-copy string args are display-cleaned and bounded, and expanded details preserve raw input/output
- update config help/docs and changelog

Fixes #45488.
Fixes #45649.
Supersedes #67090.

## Verification

Final pushed head: `96101664f07a3a43f06311bf987b63fbdbe25f08`, rebased on `origin/main` at `3dd0e8ed6a7cafdd2b4bf46114b417d758409f1b`.

Final-base proof after the last rebase/autosquash:

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 <changed files>` -> passed
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs <changed ts/mjs files>` -> passed
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo` -> passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check` -> passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/extensions.test.ts -t "workspace"` -> 4 files, 10 passed, 188 skipped
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.misc.runreplyagent.test.ts -t "reads opted-in post-compaction context"` -> 1 passed, 38 skipped
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts -t "allows explicit split Vitest config targets"` -> 1 passed, 86 skipped
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts ui/src/styles/chat/tool-cards.test.ts` -> 4 files, 59 passed
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings

Broader focused suites run earlier on the same patch family before busy-main rebases:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.misc.runreplyagent.test.ts` -> 1 file, 39 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts` -> 1 file, 87 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.test.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.post-compaction-guard.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts` -> 5 files, 240 passed

Broad changed gate was attempted but blocked by environment/provider setup:

- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` failed because `.github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml` does not contain a Testbox step
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` fell back to AWS and failed because this environment has no usable AWS credentials/IMDS access

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Post-compaction AGENTS.md reinjection is disabled unless users explicitly configure `agents.defaults.compaction.postCompactionSections`; both post-compaction context and compaction-safeguard summary suffix paths honor that policy and read AGENTS.md from the run workspace. Collapsed Control UI tool rows remain readable without hiding normal summaries behind CSS ellipses, while raw expanded tool input/output remains unchanged.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw worktree on macOS with Node/Vitest.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See the Verification section for exact Vitest, format, oxlint, typecheck, diff-check, and autoreview commands.

Evidence after fix: Unit tests cover unset config returning null, explicit `[]` disabled, explicit default sections enabled with legacy fallback, custom sections, compaction-safeguard summary default-disabled behavior, explicit summary opt-in, run-workspace AGENTS.md reads, collapsed display cleanup, bounded raw string fallback, and raw expanded details preservation.

Observed result after fix: Final-base static checks, targeted CI-regression tests, UI regression suite, and autoreview passed on `96101664f0`.

What was not tested: Full `pnpm check:changed` was not completed because both configured Crabbox remote providers were blocked by environment/provider setup as described above.
target.author: bunsdev

commands.reason: repair commands require an open issue or PR
